calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Approving Duscretionary Acts Of Trustees And For Order Modifying Trust.
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elen Shapiro and Adine Varah for the City of San Francisco (Petitioner). Lisa Carvalho for Wells Fargo Bank (Co-Petitioner). Robert Johnson and Judy Garth from the of Fine Arts Museum.

Ms. Varah reported that there were no oppostiions and that the Attorney General had filed a statement of non opposition. The matter was granted and the Order was signed in open court.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Doug Handa.
